plugins._comment: Wraps @semantic-release/commit-analyzer (forwarded this preset + releaseRules verbatim) to cap the MINOR component at three digits: the release that would become X.1000.0 rolls over to (X+1).0.0 instead. That rollover major is COSMETIC — no breaking change behind it — and is safe here because the app is npmPublish:false (the version only feeds Helm appVersion + Docker tags). A real breaking change still bumps the major the normal way via feat!/BREAKING CHANGE. See scripts/lib/minor-cap.mjs.

plugins.changelogTitle:
# Changelog

All notable changes to **inflect-compliance** are documented here.
This file is auto-generated by [semantic-release](https://github.com/semantic-release/semantic-release).

plugins._comment: Sync infra/helm/inflect/Chart.yaml::appVersion to ${nextRelease.version} during the prepare phase so the Helm chart and package.json release in lock-step. Without this, every PR opened after a release fails the structural guard at tests/guards/helm-chart-foundation.test.ts:69 until someone manually bumps the chart (recurring root cause of PR #53). The script fails LOUDLY (non-zero exit) if the regex misses — silent no-op would re-introduce the same drift.
